problem:
How do I make a flat list out of a list of lists?.

I have a list of lists like

[
    [1, 2, 3],
    [4, 5, 6],
    [7],
    [8, 9]
]

How can I flatten it to get [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9]?

Editor's notes:

If your list of lists comes from a nested list comprehension, the problem can be solved more simply/directly by fixing the comprehension; please see How can
